{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Genesis Vault
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Pilot (novel)|The Pilot]]
}}

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Genesis Vault]] takes the form of a pane of glass with an indistinct silhouette behind it.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23">''The Pilot'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Genesis Vault]] is a shadow trapped in glass.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
